// Comment: VS Code workspace settings for PalLLM. Repo-wide editorconfig is in .editorconfig at the root; this file is for VS Code-specific knobs that don't fit the cross-IDE editorconfig schema.
// editorconfig still wins: Markdown intentionally keeps trailing whitespace (line-break sentinel). The repo .editorconfig overrides files.trimTrailingWhitespace for *.md.
// .NET 10 SDK: MSBuild expects this version. The release ZIP and CI both run on this SDK; bumping it requires a docs sweep.
// XML doc generation: Both csproj files have GenerateDocumentationFile=true. The repo-root Directory.Build.props suppresses CS1591 noise.
// Test runner: We use NUnit 3.x. The 'test' VS Code task delegates to pal.ps1.
